name: Chunky Chewie Brownie Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Cream Crisco shortening, brown sugar, eggs, water, and vanilla extract in a large bowl on medium speed of an electric mixer until light and creamy.
3. Sift flour, cocoa powder, salt, and baking soda together. Add the sifted ingredients gradually to the creamed mixture, mixing on low speed until blended.
4. Stir in chocolate chips. Drop tablespoonfuls (15 mL) onto ungreased baking sheets, leaving room for spreading.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 7 to 9 minutes, or just until set. Do not overbake. Cookies should be soft and moist. Cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet, then remove to a wire rack and cool completely.
Makes: About 50 cookies. Preparation time: 15 minutes. Baking time: 9 minutes.
